summary: Home | Validate Home Page After Login
gherkin:
When the user lands on the Home page after successful authentication
Then the Page title "Home" is displayed in the header
And "Streaming Operator Platform" is visible in the top left corner
And Left sidebar shows all navigation items (Home highlighted)
And Main content displays 11 tool tiles in grid layout:
* BTC Tools
* Overrides
* Blackout Override
* Logger
* Media Validation
* Milestones
* Audit & Logging
* Partner Delivery
* ESNI Management
* User Lookup and
* QA Tools
And Bottom sidebar shows: Submit Feedback, Settings, <User name>
And All tool tiles are clickable and navigate to respective pages
